title: Sex Is Zero
tmdbOverview: Eun-sik tries to pass the state exam while studying in college after his military service. One day, he meets a beautiful woman Eun-hyo, and his life changes.
synopsis: Sex Is Zero (2002) is a comedy, romance and k-drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.5 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a NC-17 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
